title: Main Menu Panoramas
description: 15+ main menu panorama backgrounds with shaders
body:
> yall don't have to get the latest version, you can choose whichever you like from the gallery 😭
> is the end city really that good lol \- sumone, 2026-05-11 ## ❗ This pack works in all versions 1.6.1+, Minecraft is just being cautious with version compatibility This project of mine started because I was bored one summer and wanted to do something new with shaders and also because *it look pretty*. Then I decided I might as well publish it so here we are! I used a variety of shader packs which are usually mentioned in the changelog or pack.mcmeta (if I remember of course). In addition, this is paired with [Faithful](https://faithfulpack.net/) 32x (some older ones use 64x) so huge shoutout, favorite pack that I put on every mc instance. Seeds with coordinates are a recent addition, but only for the worlds I still have saved so some of them are lost forever. Also, I play(ed) on the server [play.simplyvanilla.co](https://simplyvanilla.co) which is where I got the SV ones; cool server, would personally recommend 👍. ## ⭐ Featured/Favourite Works:
html my beloved ### And more in the gallery! My discord is sumone_lol if anyone wants to make suggestions or report any issues btw A comment section would be nice. Modrinth, wink wink nudge nudge
Update: From now on for the forseeable future, I don't have very much time to work on this project. I might still drop a pano every now and then but IRL has gotten busy. (like getting a real j*b I'm also planning on redoing older panos because I cringe whenever I look at them lol
